title: Conventions Descriptor
description: Repo-root .conventions.yaml describing which conventions a repo opts into. Schema doc: skills/convention-engineering/references/core/conventions-yaml.md.

agent_docs.description: Agent contract files (e.g. CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md) the repo guarantees exist with the required sections.

docs_root.description: Top-level docs directory (commonly 'docs' or '.docs'). Must contain requests/, planning/, plans/, implementation/, taxonomy/.

taskfile.description: Repo declares a canonical Taskfile.yml with a verify target.

pre_commit.description: Repo runs a pre-commit hook (.githooks/pre-commit + core.hooksPath, or equivalent installed hook).

operations.description: Adopted operational conventions. Each entry must map to a documented op under skills/convention-engineering/references/operations/.

min_work_version.description: Minimum semver version of the external work CLI this repo's conventions assume. Probed by scripts/verify.sh.

checks.description: Free-form list of agent-readable rules. Interpreted by the convention-engineering audit and convention-evaluator scoring; not machine-validated by this schema.

epic.description: Epic-wrapper pattern configuration. Leaves are sibling repo names; scripts/bootstrap.sh links each one under repo/<leaf>.

leaves.description: Sibling repo directory names. Each leaf implies a sibling checkout at ../<leaf> and a wrapper-local symlink at repo/<leaf>.

composed.description: When true, the repo may assert compose.yaml lists each leaf.
